HGSS.684.0001:
Hey, let’s be friends!
I figure nobody who likes Pokémon\r
could be a bad person.\f
Let’s chat about PIKACHU and SLOWPOKE
and TENTACRUEL and all kinds of\r
other Pokémon. It’ll be fun!\r
What do you think?\f
Can I get your phone number?[0200,0000]
HGSS.684.0002:
Sure thing! If anything
Pokémon-related comes up, I’ll call!
HGSS.684.0003:
You...
I bet you don’t even like Pokémon...
HGSS.684.0004:
Let’s chat about Pokémon!
Can I get your phone number?[0200,0000]
HGSS.684.0005:
I’ve been looking for you!
Here, see this? This is it!\f
I’m certain your Pokémon will love my
gift, too!\f
HGSS.684.0006:
What’s that?
Wait, you’re near me, aren’t you?\f
I can tell.\f
How? Because you give off this aura of
affection for Pokémon!\f
If you’re nearby, come on and talk to
me in person about Pokémon stuff!
HGSS.684.0007:
Hey, listen to this.
My [0100,000A,0000] totally grins when\r
I pinch its cheek.\f
But it never grins like that for
anyone else. I must be special.\f
Oh, and just now, my PIKACHU beat a
wild [0100,000B,0000]!\r
A wild [0100,000B,0000], I’m sayin’!\f
Yeah, amazing, isn’t it?\f
My PIKACHU is awesome!\f
My PIKACHU is the greatest!
Talk to you later.
HGSS.684.0008:
Hey, listen to this.
My [0100,000A,0000] totally grins when\r
I pinch its cheek.\f
But it never grins like that for
anyone else. I must be special.\f
Oh, and I saw a wild [0100,000B,0000] a
little while ago. But it wasn’t very\r
cute, so I left it...\f
Pokémon have to be cute. They’re no
good otherwise.\f
Talk to you later.
HGSS.684.0009:
How are your Pokémon doing?\f
Let’s get together and brag about our
Pokémon!
HGSS.684.0010:
I’d like you to have a Nugget.\f
My PIKACHU just loves it.\f
I’m certain your Pokémon will love
it, too!
HGSS.684.0011:
What’s wrong?
I’m waiting on [0104,0003,0000].\r
Come and pick this up anytime.
HGSS.684.0012:
Did you remember?
The Bug-Catching Contest is today.\f
You’re going to go, aren’t you?\f
I think I’ll participate with PIKACHU to
show off its cuteness.
HGSS.684.0013:
The Bug-Catching Contest is at the
National Park today.\f
Are you going, [0103,0000,0000]?
I’m trying to make up my mind.
